title: schoutenia corneri
intro: Schoutenia corneri, also known as the Corner's Schoutenia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, native to the Philippines. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antimalarial, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Schoutenia corneri include its potential to alleviate fever, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion for medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
